item.g:title: Pipeline Hawaii Surf Poster | Banzai Pipeline North Shore Oahu Print | Vintage Beach Wall Art | Printable Surf Decor
item.g:description:
Bring the legendary power of Pipeline right into your home with this vintage-style surf poster celebrating one of the most iconic waves on the planet — Banzai Pipeline on Oahu's North Shore.
—
WHAT'S INCLUDED
This is a digital download — no physical item will be shipped. After purchase you will receive instant access to high-resolution files in both JPG and PDF formats, optimized for the following print sizes:
• 5×7 inches • 8×10 inches • 11×14 inches • 16×20 inches • 18×24 inches • 24×36 inches • A4 (210 × 297 mm) • A3 (297 × 420 mm)
All files are 300 DPI, ensuring crisp, vibrant results whether you print at home or use a professional print service.
—
STYLING IDEAS
This Pipeline poster is incredibly versatile and looks stunning in a variety of settings. Here are three ways to style it:
1. Surf-Inspired Living Room — Frame the 16×20 or 18×24 version in a natural wood frame and hang it above a rattan sofa or console table. Pair it with woven textures, tropical greenery, and other coastal accents for a relaxed North Shore vibe that anchors the whole room.
2. Beach House Hallway Gallery — Print the 11×14 size and group it alongside other destination surf prints in matching white or light oak frames. A curated gallery wall of surf spots creates a visual journey down the hallway and sparks conversation with every guest who walks through.
3. Home Office or Studio — Use the 8×10 or A4 size on a floating shelf next to your monitor. A glimpse of Pipeline's turquoise barrels is the perfect antidote to screen fatigue and keeps the stoke alive during the workday.
—
SIZE GUIDE
Choosing the right file for your frame is simple:
• 5×7 file → fits standard 5×7 inch frames (great for desks and shelves) • 8×10 file → fits standard 8×10 inch frames (popular for small wall displays) • 11×14 file → fits standard 11×14 inch frames (ideal for gallery walls) • 16×20 file → fits standard 16×20 inch frames (strong statement piece) • 18×24 file → fits standard 18×24 inch frames (large feature wall) • 24×36 file → fits standard 24×36 inch frames (poster-size impact) • A4 file → fits standard A4 frames (common in Europe and Australia) • A3 file → fits standard A3 frames (larger international option)
If your frame size falls between two options, choose the next size up and ask your print shop to trim to fit.
—
PRINTING TIPS
At Home: Use a heavyweight matte or semi-gloss photo paper (at least 200 gsm) for the best results. Set your printer to its highest quality setting and select "actual size" so the image isn't scaled or cropped. Matte paper gives a vintage, gallery-quality feel that complements the retro style of this poster perfectly.
Professional Print Shops: Upload the PDF or JPG file to services like FedEx Office, Staples, Costco Photo, or Shutterfly. For sizes 16×20 and above, professional printing on archival matte or lustre paper delivers exceptional color accuracy and longevity. Many local print shops can also mount or frame your print for a finished, ready-to-hang result.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: Will anything be mailed to me? A: No. This listing is for digital files only. After completing your purchase, you can download the files immediately from your Etsy account. No physical product will be shipped.
Q: Can I print this more than once? A: Absolutely. Once you download the files, you can print as many copies as you like for your own personal use. Print one for every room or give framed copies as gifts to fellow surf lovers.
Q: The colors on my print look different from the screen preview — what should I do? A: Screen colors can vary depending on your monitor's calibration. For the most accurate color reproduction, use a professional print service and request a proof before committing to a large run. Adjusting your printer's color profile to sRGB can also help match the on-screen preview more closely.
—
Transform any space into a tribute to one of surfing's most revered breaks. Download your Pipeline poster today and let the North Shore energy flow through your walls.

2. Home Office or Study: Mount the poster in a sleek black or white frame above your desk. Choosing the right file for your frame is simple:
• Small accent frames (desk, shelf, or nightstand): Use the 5x7 file. • Standard wall frames: The 8x10 or 11x14 files work perfectly for medium-sized frames commonly found at home goods stores. • Statement pieces: Choose the 16x20 or 18x24 file for a bold, eye-catching display above furniture. • Large-format or poster frames: The 24x36 file is ideal for oversized frames or professional poster mounts. • International standard frames: Use the A4 file for smaller European frames or the A3 file for a larger international standard.
Always confirm your frame's interior dimensions before printing to ensure a perfect fit.

PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 200 gsm) for the best results. Set your printer to its highest quality mode and select the correct paper type in your print settings. Matte paper gives a classic, vintage feel that complements the retro style of this poster beautifully.

Q: Can I print this more than once? A: Absolutely. Once you download the files, you can print as many copies as you like for personal use. They are perfect for decorating multiple rooms or gifting framed prints to friends and family.
Q: What if the colors look different on my print than on my screen? A: Monitor settings and printer calibrations vary, so slight color differences are normal. For the closest color match, use a professional print service and request a proof before your final print. Adjusting your monitor's brightness and contrast to standard settings can also help.

item.g:description:
Bring the golden warmth of Huntington Beach into your home with this vintage-inspired travel poster — a timeless tribute to Surf City, California, designed to complement any coastal or modern living space.
—
WHAT'S INCLUDED
This is a digital download — no physical item will be shipped. After purchase, you'll receive instant access to high-resolution files in both JPG and PDF formats. The included files are optimized for the following standard print sizes:
• 5x7 inches • 8x10 inches • 11x14 inches • 16x20 inches • 18x24 inches • 24x36 inches • A4 (210 x 297 mm) • A3 (297 x 420 mm)
All files are 300 DPI, ensuring crisp, vibrant results whether you print at home or at a professional print shop.
—
STYLING IDEAS
This Huntington Beach poster is incredibly versatile. Here are three ways to style it in your space:
1. Beach House Living Room: Frame the 24x36 print in a light natural wood frame and hang it above a linen sofa. Pair it with woven textures, driftwood accents, and soft blue throw pillows for an effortless coastal vibe that feels like a permanent vacation.
2. Home Office or Study: Print the 11x14 size and place it in a sleek white or matte black frame on a floating shelf above your desk. The warm tones and retro aesthetic add personality and a sense of wanderlust to your workspace without being distracting.
3. Hallway Gallery Wall: Use the 8x10 or 5x7 print as part of a curated gallery wall alongside other vintage travel posters, family beach photos, and botanical prints. Mix frame styles — thin gold, weathered wood, and simple black — for an eclectic, collected-over-time look.
—
SIZE GUIDE
Not sure which file to use? Here's a quick reference for common frame sizes:
• Small desk or shelf frame → 5x7 file • Standard tabletop or small wall frame → 8x10 file • Medium wall frame → 11x14 file • Large statement piece → 16x20 or 18x24 file • Oversized feature wall print → 24x36 file • International standard frames → A4 or A3 file
All files are included with your purchase, so you can print multiple sizes for different rooms or give them as gifts.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 200 gsm) for the best results. Set your printer to its highest quality setting and select the correct paper type in your printer preferences. Matte paper gives a vintage, poster-like feel, while satin or luster paper adds a subtle sheen.
For Professional Printing: Upload the appropriate file to a print service such as FedEx Office, Staples, Costco Photo, Shutterfly, or your local print shop. Request archival or giclée printing on matte cardstock or fine art paper for museum-quality results. For larger sizes like 18x24 or 24x36, professional printing is highly recommended for the sharpest detail and most accurate color reproduction.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: Will I receive a physical print in the mail? A: No. This listing is for digital files only. Nothing will be shipped. After completing your purchase, you can download the files immediately from your Etsy account and print them at home or at any print shop.
Q: Can I resize the files myself? A: The files are provided in the most popular standard sizes. While you can resize them using image editing software, we recommend using the included file that most closely matches your desired print size to maintain optimal resolution and quality.
Q: Can I use this print as a gift? A: Absolutely! Print it, frame it, and you have a thoughtful, personalized gift for anyone who loves California, beach culture, or vintage travel art. The files are yours to print as many times as you like for personal use.
—
Transform your walls with the sun-soaked spirit of Huntington Beach. Download your files today and start decorating in minutes.

All files are ready for immediate download after purchase. No physical item will be shipped — this is a digital download only.
—
STYLING IDEAS
This Sunset Beach Hawaii poster is incredibly versatile and works beautifully in a variety of spaces. Here are three ways to style it:
1. Beach House Living Room: Frame the 16x20 or 18x24 version in a light natural wood frame and hang it above a linen sofa. Pair it with woven textures, driftwood accents, and soft blue throw pillows for a relaxed coastal vibe that feels like a permanent vacation.
2. Home Office or Study: Print the 11x14 size and place it in a slim black frame on a floating shelf above your desk. The warm sunset tones and retro aesthetic add personality and calm to a workspace without being distracting — a great conversation starter during video calls.
3. Hallway Gallery Wall: Use the 8x10 or 5x7 print as part of a curated gallery wall alongside other vintage travel posters, surfing prints, and beach photography. Mix frame styles — thin gold, white, and natural wood — for an eclectic, collected-over-time look that tells a story of adventure.
—
SIZE GUIDE
Choosing the right size depends on where you plan to display your print:
• 5x7 — Perfect for small tabletop frames, bookshelves, or as part of a tight gallery grouping. • 8x10 — A classic size that fits standard off-the-shelf frames. Great for desks, shelves, and small wall spaces. • 11x14 — Ideal for a medium statement piece above a side table or in a reading nook. • 16x20 — A popular choice for living rooms and bedrooms. Makes a strong visual impact without overwhelming the wall. • 18x24 — Great for larger walls, entryways, or above a console table. • 24x36 — A bold, large-format poster size perfect for feature walls or open-plan spaces. • A4 / A3 — Standard international sizes, easy to find frames for in most countries.
All files are included in your download, so you can print multiple sizes for different rooms or gift them to friends.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use a high-quality inkjet printer with heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 200 gsm) for the best results. Set your printer to the highest quality setting and select the correct paper type in your print dialog. Matte paper gives a beautiful vintage feel that complements the retro style of this poster.
For Professional Printing: Upload your file to a print service such as FedEx Office, Staples, Walgreens, Shutterfly, or your local print shop. Request archival or giclée printing on matte cardstock or fine art paper for museum-quality results. Most services accept both JPG and PDF files and can print any of the included sizes.
Tip: Always select "actual size" or "100%" when printing to avoid cropping or scaling issues.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: How do I access my files after purchase? A: After completing your order, Etsy will send you a download link via email. You can also find your files by going to your Etsy account, selecting "Purchases and Reviews," and clicking the "Download Files" button next to this order. Files are available immediately.
Q: Can I print this at a larger size than 24x36? A: The files are designed to print beautifully up to 24x36 inches. Printing beyond that size may result in some loss of sharpness. For oversized prints, we recommend consulting with a professional print shop that can advise on the best output for your needs.
Q: Can I use this print as a gift? A: Absolutely. Print it, frame it, and you have a thoughtful, personalized gift for anyone who loves Hawaii, surfing, beach culture, or vintage travel art. Please note that the files are for personal use only and may not be resold or redistributed.

item.g:description:

WHAT'S INCLUDED
Your purchase includes high-resolution digital files in both JPG and PDF formats, optimized for crisp, vibrant printing at any size. The download package covers the following print dimensions so you can choose the perfect fit for your frame:

—
STYLING IDEAS
This Jaws Maui surf poster is incredibly versatile and works beautifully in a variety of spaces. Here are three ways to style it:
1. Coastal Living Room: Frame the 24x36 print in a slim natural wood frame and hang it as a statement piece above your sofa or console table. Pair it with linen throw pillows in ocean blues and sandy neutrals for a laid-back Hawaiian vibe that anchors the entire room.
2. Beach House Hallway or Entryway: Print the 16x20 or 18x24 size and group it in a gallery wall alongside other vintage destination surf prints. Mix black and white frames for an eclectic, collected-over-time look that greets guests with instant coastal character.
3. Home Office or Den: Choose the 11x14 or 8x10 size for a desk-adjacent wall or bookshelf lean. The retro color palette adds warmth and personality to a workspace without overwhelming it — a daily reminder that the ocean is never too far away.
—
SIZE GUIDE
Choosing the right file for your frame is simple. Here is a quick reference:
• Small frames (5x7 or 8x10): Perfect for shelves, desks, and intimate groupings. • Medium frames (11x14 or A4): Ideal for gallery walls and smaller accent walls. • Large frames (16x20 or 18x24 or A3): Great as a focal point in a bedroom or living area. • Oversized frames (24x36): Best for statement walls, above furniture, or large open spaces.
Select the file that matches your frame dimensions, and you are ready to print.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use a heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 230 gsm) for the richest color and a professional feel. Set your printer to its highest quality mode and select the correct paper type in your print settings. Allow the print to dry for a few minutes before framing to prevent smudging.
For Professional Print Shops: Upload the PDF or JPG file to any online or local print service such as FedEx Office, Staples, Costco Photo, or Shutterfly. Request archival matte or lustre paper for the best results. The high-resolution files ensure sharp, vivid output even at the largest 24x36 size. Most shops can have your print ready within a day or two.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: Will I receive a physical print in the mail? A: No. This listing is for digital files only. Nothing will be shipped to you. After purchase, you will receive an instant download link from Etsy where you can access all included file sizes in both JPG and PDF formats.
Q: Can I print this at a larger size than 24x36? A: The files are optimized for sizes up to 24x36 inches. Printing beyond that dimension may result in some loss of sharpness. For most home and office settings, 24x36 is already a generous statement size.
Q: Can I use this print for commercial purposes or resale? A: This file is licensed for personal use only. You are welcome to print copies for your own home, as gifts for friends and family, or for personal decorating projects. Commercial reproduction, resale of the digital files, or use in products for sale is not permitted.

• Small desk or shelf frame → 5x7 file • Standard photo frame → 8x10 file • Medium wall frame → 11x14 file • Large statement frame → 16x20 file • Oversized feature wall → 18x24 or 24x36 file • International standard frames → A4 or A3 file
If you're unsure, the 16x20 size is a popular choice that makes a strong visual impact without overwhelming most walls.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For the best results at home, use a high-quality inkjet printer with heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 200 gsm). Set your printer to its highest quality mode and select the correct paper type in your print settings. Allow the print to dry for a few minutes before handling or framing to prevent smudging.
For larger sizes like 18x24 or 24x36, or if you want gallery-quality results, we recommend uploading your file to a professional print service such as FedEx Office, Staples, Costco Photo, or an online printer like Shutterfly or Nations Photo Lab. Most services accept both JPG and PDF files and offer a range of paper finishes including matte, semi-gloss, and canvas.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: Will anything be shipped to me? A: No. This is a digital download only. No physical print, frame, or mat is included. After completing your purchase, you will receive an instant download link from Etsy where you can access all of your files.
Q: Can I resize the files myself? A: The included files are optimized for the sizes listed above. We do not recommend enlarging them beyond 24x36 inches, as this may reduce print clarity. If you need a custom size, please message us before purchasing and we will do our best to accommodate your request.
Q: Can I use this print for commercial purposes? A: This listing is for personal use only. You may print copies for your own home, or as a gift, but reselling, redistributing, or using the artwork for commercial products is not permitted. Please reach out if you have questions about licensing.

• Desk or shelf display: Use the 5x7 file for small tabletop frames. • Standard wall frame: The 8x10 file fits the most widely available frames at home goods stores. • Medium statement piece: Choose the 11x14 file for a noticeable but not overpowering presence on the wall. • Large feature print: The 16x20 or 18x24 file works perfectly above a couch, bed headboard, or credenza. • Oversized poster: Use the 24x36 file for a dramatic, gallery-quality focal point in any room. • International sizes: A4 is ideal for standard European frames, while A3 gives you a larger format for bolder impact.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 200 gsm) for the best results. Set your printer to its highest quality mode and select "actual size" or "100%" scaling so the image isn't stretched or cropped. Matte paper tends to give vintage-style prints a more authentic, poster-like feel.
For Professional Printing: Upload the appropriate file size to a print service such as FedEx Office, Staples, Walgreens, Shutterfly, or a local print shop. ───────────────────────────────── STYLING IDEAS ─────────────────────────────────

2. Minimalist Baby Room: Let this piece stand on its own in a clean, white-walled nursery. A slim white or pale birch frame keeps the look modern and uncluttered. Add a single potted plant or woven basket nearby for subtle texture without overwhelming the space.
3. Coastal Playroom or Reading Nook: As your little one grows, this print transitions beautifully into a playroom or reading corner. Lean it on a low shelf alongside board books and soft toys for an inviting, beach-inspired space that sparks imagination and a love of the ocean.
───────────────────────────────── SIZE GUIDE ─────────────────────────────────
Choosing the right file for your frame is simple. Here's a quick reference:
• 5x7 — Perfect for a small shelf display or gallery wall accent • 8x10 — The most popular home-printer-friendly size; fits standard frames from most retailers • 11x14 — A versatile mid-size option ideal for a nursery gallery wall • 16x20 — A statement size that works beautifully above a crib or dresser • 18x24 — Great for larger nursery walls or as a standalone feature piece • 24x36 — Poster-sized for maximum visual impact in a playroom or accent wall • A4 — Standard international size, widely available in frame shops outside the US • A3 — Larger international option for a bolder presentation

For Home Printing: Use a high-quality inkjet printer with heavyweight matte or satin photo paper (at least 200 gsm). Set your printer to "best quality" or "high resolution" and select the correct paper type in your printer settings. Allow the print to dry for a few minutes before framing to avoid smudging.

Bring the spirit of the coast into your home with this richly detailed embroidered-patch-style print featuring a bold "Tide Chaser" design on a deep burgundy canvas background — perfect for anyone who lives for the rhythm of the waves.
—
WHAT'S INCLUDED
Your purchase includes high-resolution digital files ready for immediate download:
• JPG files optimized for printing at home or at a professional print shop • PDF files for easy, consistent color reproduction • Sizes included: 5x7, 8x10, 11x14, 16x20, 18x24, 24x36, A4, and A3
No physical item will be shipped. After completing your purchase, you can download all files instantly from your Etsy account.
—
STYLING IDEAS
This versatile print works beautifully in a variety of spaces. Here are three ways to style it:
1. Surf-Inspired Living Room: Frame the print in a natural wood or matte black frame and hang it above a linen sofa alongside other coastal-themed artwork. Pair with woven textures, driftwood accents, and muted earth tones for a laid-back, beachy living room that feels curated but effortless.
2. Home Office or Studio: Add personality to your workspace by placing the Tide Chaser print on a floating shelf or leaning it against the wall on your desk. The burgundy tones bring warmth to a neutral office palette, and the patch-style design adds a creative, adventurous energy to your daily routine.
3. Entryway or Mudroom: Welcome guests with coastal character. Print at 11x14 or 16x20 and frame in a slim white or brass frame. Hang it near hooks, a bench, or a shoe rack for an inviting first impression that sets the tone for the rest of your home.
—
SIZE GUIDE
Not sure which file to use? Here's a quick reference for common frame sizes:
• 5x7 — Great for small tabletop frames and shelf vignettes • 8x10 — The most popular home-printing size; fits standard frames found at most stores • 11x14 — A versatile mid-size option perfect for gallery walls • 16x20 — Ideal for a statement piece above a desk or console table • 18x24 — A bold poster size that works well in larger rooms • 24x36 — Maximum impact for feature walls and open floor plans • A4 — Standard international paper size, ideal for home printers outside the US • A3 — Larger international format for professional printing
All files are 300 DPI for crisp, vibrant results at every size.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use heavyweight matte or satin photo paper for the best results. Set your printer to its highest quality setting and select "actual size" or "100%" scaling so the image isn't stretched or cropped. Matte paper tends to complement the vintage patch aesthetic especially well.
For Professional Print Shops: Upload the JPG or PDF file to your preferred print service — popular options include FedEx Office, Staples, Walgreens, CVS, or online services like Shutterfly and Nations Photo Lab. Select "matte" or "semi-gloss" cardstock for a finish that enhances the retro, textured feel of the design. Most shops can print up to 24x36 at an affordable price.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: How do I access my files after purchase? A: Once your payment is confirmed, Etsy will make the files available for download on your Purchases and Reviews page. You can also find the download link in your confirmation email. No waiting for shipping — it's all instant.
Q: Can I resize the files myself? A: The included files cover the most popular print sizes, so resizing shouldn't be necessary. However, because the files are 300 DPI, you can scale down without losing quality. Scaling up beyond the provided sizes is not recommended, as it may reduce sharpness.
Q: Can I use this print for commercial purposes? A: This listing is for personal use only. The files may not be resold, redistributed, or used in commercial products. If you're interested in a commercial license, please reach out through Etsy messages and we'll be happy to discuss options.
—
Thank you for supporting our shop. We hope the Tide Chaser print brings a little coastal soul to your favorite space.

item.g:title: Sumi-e Wave Ink Painting | Japanese Brush Art | Red Accent Ocean Print | Asian Wall Decor | Printable Art
item.g:description:
Bring the meditative beauty of traditional Japanese ink painting into your home with this stunning sumi-e wave artwork, featuring bold black brush strokes and a striking red accent that captures the raw energy of the ocean in timeless Asian artistic style.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ WHAT'S INCLUDED ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• 5x7 inches • 8x10 inches • 11x14 inches • 16x20 inches • 18x24 inches • 24x36 inches • A4 (210 × 297 mm) • A3 (297 × 420 mm)
Files are 300 DPI, ensuring sharp detail and smooth tonal gradations in every brush stroke, from the deepest blacks to the subtle gray washes that define authentic sumi-e technique.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ STYLING IDEAS ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1. ZEN LIVING ROOM — Frame this piece in a slim black or natural wood frame and hang it above a low-profile sofa or media console. Pair it with neutral linen textiles, a ceramic vase, and a single branch of dried eucalyptus for a calm, Japanese-inspired living space. The red accent in the artwork provides just enough warmth to anchor the room without overwhelming a minimalist palette.
2. HOME OFFICE OR STUDY — Mount the print behind your desk as a focal point that inspires focus and creative flow. The dynamic movement of the wave contrasts beautifully with clean, modern desk accessories. Choose a white mat with a dark frame to let the ink work breathe, and complement it with a small bonsai or stone tray on the desk.
3. ENTRYWAY OR HALLWAY GALLERY — Use the 18x24 or 24x36 size as a statement piece in a narrow hallway or entryway. The vertical energy of the wave draws the eye upward, making the space feel taller. Combine it with other Asian-inspired prints or simple black-and-white photographs for a curated gallery wall that greets guests with sophistication.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ SIZE GUIDE ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Choosing the right size depends on your wall space and frame:
• Desk or shelf display — use the 5x7 file • Standard wall frame — use the 8x10 or 11x14 file • Statement wall art — use the 16x20 or 18x24 file • Large-format or poster-size — use the 24x36 file • International standard frames — use the A4 or A3 file
All files are included in your download, so you can print multiple sizes for different rooms or give one as a gift.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ PRINTING TIPS ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FOR HOME PRINTING: Use a heavyweight matte or cotton rag paper for the most authentic sumi-e feel. Set your printer to its highest quality mode and select the correct paper type in your print settings. Matte finishes tend to replicate the look of traditional rice paper better than glossy stock.
FOR PROFESSIONAL PRINTING: Upload the JPG or PDF file to any online or local print service such as FedEx Office, Staples, Costco Photo, or Shutterfly. Request archival or giclée printing on fine art paper for museum-quality results. Most services accept the file sizes included and can print up to 24x36 without any loss of detail.
Allow prints to dry completely before framing, and consider using UV-protective glass to preserve the rich blacks and the vivid red accent over time.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Q: How do I access my files after purchase? A: Etsy will send you a download link immediately after payment is confirmed. You can also find your files anytime by going to your Etsy account, selecting Purchases and Reviews, and clicking the Download Files button next to this order.
Q: Can I print this at a larger size than 24x36? A: The files are optimized for sizes up to 24x36 inches at 300 DPI. Printing beyond that size is possible but may result in a slight softening of detail. For very large prints, consult your print shop — many can upscale with professional software while maintaining quality.
Q: Can I use this print for commercial purposes? A: This listing is for personal use only. The artwork may not be resold, redistributed, or used in commercial products. If you are interested in a commercial license, please send a message and we will be happy to discuss options.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Thank you for visiting our shop. We hope this sumi-e wave print brings a sense of calm, beauty, and artistic depth to your space. If you have any questions at all, please do not hesitate to reach out — we are always happy to help.

3. Vacation Rental or Beach House Entryway — Welcome guests with this inviting palm tree print displayed on a narrow console table or mounted beside a coat rack. The vintage patch style gives it a nostalgic, well-traveled feel that sets the tone for a relaxed coastal retreat. Lean it casually against the wall in a thick mat frame for an effortless look.
—
SIZE GUIDE
Not sure which file to use? Here's a quick reference:
• Desk or shelf display: Choose the 5×7 file for small tabletop frames. • Standard wall frame: The 8×10 file fits the most commonly available frames at home goods stores. • Medium statement piece: Use the 11×14 or A4 file for a mid-size frame that works well in a gallery wall arrangement. • Large focal point: The 16×20 or A3 file is ideal for a prominent wall space where you want the artwork to stand out. • Oversized impact: Go with the 18×24 or 24×36 file for a dramatic, poster-sized display above a couch, bed, or mantel.
—
PRINTING TIPS
For Home Printing: Use heavyweight matte cardstock or archival photo paper for the best results. Set your printer to its highest quality setting and select "actual size" or "100%" scaling so the image prints at the correct dimensions. Matte paper works especially well with this design, enhancing the cream canvas texture.
For Professional Printing: Upload the appropriate file to a print service such as Staples, FedEx Office, Walgreens, Shutterfly, or a local print shop. Request archival or giclée printing on matte or cotton rag paper for museum-quality results. Most services accept both JPG and PDF formats.
—
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Q: Will I receive a physical print in the mail? A: No. This listing is for digital files only. After your purchase is confirmed, you can download the files immediately from your Etsy account. Nothing will be shipped to you.
Q: Can I resize the files myself? A: The download includes multiple pre-sized files so you should not need to resize. However, because the files are 300 DPI, they can be scaled down without losing quality. Scaling up beyond the provided sizes is not recommended as it may reduce sharpness.
Q: What kind of frame should I use? A: That depends on your style. Natural wood, whitewashed, or light oak frames complement the cream canvas background and tropical subject beautifully. For a more modern look, try a slim black or brass metal frame. A white mat border adds breathing room and a polished gallery feel.
—
